heading: Contracting authority to expand agricultural export markets
label: 5673 Contracting authority to expand agricultural export markets

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may contract with individuals for services to be performed outside the United States as the Secretary determines necessary or appropriate for carrying out programs and activities to maintain, develop, or enhance export markets for United States agricultural commodities and products.

children.heading: Not employees of United States
children.label: b Not employees of United States
children.text: Individuals referred to in subsection (a) shall not be regarded as officers or employees of the United States.
